answers: Trauma = deeply distressing experience that overwhelms coping ability. Can cause lasting emotional and physical effects.
Recovery: seek professional therapy (CBT, EMDR), build safety, reconnect with others, and be patient with yourself.
Tips: trauma responses are normal reactions to abnormal events. Healing is possible but takes time and support.
Trauma therapy: CBT, EMDR, and somatic therapy are evidence-based. A good therapist makes all the difference.
